fields.label: 轻流授权码
fields.description: 获取授权码方式：登录轻流 → 左下角头像 → 个人中心 → 账户信息 → 安全信息 → 授权码
fields.description_en: How to obtain: Log in to QingFlow → Click the avatar in the bottom-left corner → Personal Center → Account Information → Security Information → Authorization Code
fields.help_zh: 获取方式：登录轻流 → 左下角头像 → 个人中心 → 账户信息 → 安全信息 → 授权码
fields.help_en: How to obtain: Log in to QingFlow → Click the avatar in the bottom-left corner → Personal Center → Account Information → Security Information → Authorization Code
